problem: How to achieve biological nitrogen fixation in non-legume crops to eliminate fertilizer?
hypothesis: If Bioelectrochemical system for pollutant conversion is applied to to, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Mesocosm controlled study with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
